UserPromptSubmit.description: Remind to explore codebase before generating code

hooks.description: Validate before mobile build commands (xcodebuild, gradlew, flutter build, eas build, fastlane, pod install)

Orchestration boot probe: opt-in sentinel detect, prime KB, recovery prompt on in-progress sentinel. The `compact` matcher value covers post-compaction re-prime — PreCompact is NOT registered here because per the Claude Code Hooks reference (https://code.claude.com/docs/en/hooks#precompact) PreCompact is for blocking/controlling compaction, not injecting context.

scripts.validate: node ./scripts/validate-skills.js && node ./scripts/validate-agents.js && node ./scripts/validate-blueprints.js && node ./scripts/validate-rubrics.js && bash ./scripts/check-sidecar-routing.sh && bash ./tests/prime/smoke.sh
